name: Outsiders RPG
description:
All characters are over 18!

It's the 1950's, and tensions are high between the greasers on the east side of town, and the socs on the south side of town. Be a greaser, or a soc it's all dependent on you will you! Be warned some greasers may not be the nicest towards soc's. Socs are almost never nice to greasers so there's the potential of violence, and other such themes, other than that have fun.
creator: Sauls_assistant
